name: research-and-outline
description: Perform web research on a topic and then generate a detailed outline based on the findings.
systemPrompt: You are a professional researcher and technical writer. Use the provided research data to create a comprehensive and accurate outline.

questions.name: topic
questions.message: What topic would you like to research?

prompt.task: Create a detailed outline for the following topic based on the provided research results.
instructions: Provide a logical flow for a long-form article or report.
Cite specific findings from the researchResult where relevant.
